CREATE TABLE urls (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url CLOB);
SELECT sys.getdomain(url) FROM urls WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.getdomain(url) FROM urls WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM urls WHERE url IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, sys.getdomain(url) AS domain FROM urls ORDER BY domain;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM urls WHERE sys.getdomain(url) IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE suburls (url_id INT, sub_url CLOB, FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls(id));
SELECT u.id, sys.getdomain(su.sub_url) AS sub_domain FROM urls u JOIN suburls su ON u.id = su.url_id;
SELECT DISTINCT sys.getdomain(url) FROM urls WHERE url LIKE 'http%';
SELECT sys.getdomain(url) FROM (SELECT url FROM urls WHERE id = 2) AS subquery;
SELECT u.id, sys.getdomain(u.url) FROM urls u WHERE u.url IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT s.url_id, sys.getdomain(s.sub_url) FROM suburls s;
